ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the instructor belongs */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grading_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grading criterion */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the criterion belongs */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the grading criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grading criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the grading criterion */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the grading criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grading_criteria_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation standard */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grading criterion to which the standard belongs */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation standard */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the evaluation standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_standards_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES grading_criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the assignment belongs */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade assigned to the assignment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file submitted */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the student belongs */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peer review */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who reviewed the assignment */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviews_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being graded */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grading criterion */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade assigned to the assignment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES grading_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rubrics" (
  "rubric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rubric */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the rubric belongs */,
  "rubric_name" TEXT /* Name of the grading rubric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grading rubric */,
  "rubric_type" TEXT /* Type of the rubric (e.g., analytic, holistic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rubric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rubrics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rubric_criteria" (
  "rubric_criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rubric criterion */,
  "rubric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grading rubric to which the criterion belongs */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grading criterion */,
  "criterion_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the criterion in the rubric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rubric_criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rubric_criteria_rubric_id FOREIGN KEY ("rubric_id") REFERENCES rubrics ("rubric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rubric_criteria_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES grading_criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, teaching assistant, student) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the system was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., grade, feedback) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment for which the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_comments" TEXT /* Comments of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)
